description: Project status queries - migration progress, task completion, memory-bank state assessment
purpose: Handle status/progress queries by routing to memory-bank schemas for real-time project state

query_analysis.step_1: Parse status query for scope (project-wide, specific feature, migration phase)
query_analysis.step_2: Route to appropriate memory-bank schemas based on query type

project_status.description: Overall project health and completion percentage

task_status.description: Individual task or feature completion check

response_format.data_aggregation: Compile from multiple memory-bank schemas via @mcp:json-jq
response_format.no_hallucination: ONLY report data present in memory-bank schemas - never infer or assume

integration.memory_bank_first: Always query memory-bank schemas before code inspection
integration.fallback: If memory-bank empty (null), populate from actual codebase state, then update schemas
integration.constitutional_compliance: Article 14 - Duty to Update 8-Schema Memory Bank after status assessment

skipping_memory_bank.description: Querying code directly without checking memory-bank first

missing_mcp_chain.description: Using Read() instead of @mcp:json-jq for JSON operations

hallucinated_status.description: Reporting status not backed by memory-bank data
